rows.requirement: Typed strategy DSL separates economic and risk components
rows.detail: 9720 typed, hard-gated strategy specifications with deterministic hashes.

rows.requirement: Every trial has complete code/data/config/cost lineage
rows.detail: 58320 trials trace to strategy, code, dataset, cutoff, feature set, and cost model.

rows.requirement: Leaderboard and rejected rows trace to configuration hashes
rows.detail: 9720 leaderboard rows and 8448 rejected rows retain lineage.

rows.requirement: Purged and embargoed folds never select on the test session
rows.detail: 6 train-only selection folds exclude each test session and adjacent sessions.

rows.requirement: Multiple-testing penalties and null findings remain explicit
Parameter stability surface is evaluated, not merely proposed
rows.detail: 27 local entry/take-profit/stop-loss perturbations evaluated across all sessions.

rows.requirement: Champion freeze is content-addressed and immutable
rows.detail: Freeze a3d6b2899ca96e570f4c16db binds champion, data cutoff, data manifest, strategy code, costs, and config.

rows.requirement: Champion lifecycle registry is explicit and reproducible
rows.detail: Champion, 5 challengers, 10 watch candidates, retired history, and rejected population are recorded.
